title: Rogue's Horror Experience
description: Trying to make Minecraft as scary as possible
body:
Welcome to the nightmare!
Up until Halloween this yearh (2024), I will be working on this horror modpack, with the goal in mind to create FRIGHTENING gameplay with (little to) NO unkillable super powerful monsters!
Included are all the horror mods I could find, some QoL mods, and some tech/magic mods I found fit the theme!

Mods included:
!!This section includes spoilers, only read through if you don't want to go in blind!!
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
 
   [Additional Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/addadd) for a few small useful items that improve gameplay

   [Ambient Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) to make the game feel more alive

   [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) shows you how much hunger and saturation a food item gives

   [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) is required for JustHammers, ItemFilters, FTB mods, and Gardens of the Dead
   
   [Armor Points ++](https://modrinth.com/mod/armorpoints) shows you how much armor you have when you have more than 20 armor points
   
   [AutoRegLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/autoreglib) is required for Quark

   [Autumnity](https://modrinth.com/mod/autumnity) adds fall-themed content

   [Bad Dreams](https://modrinth.com/mod/bad-dreams) makes sleeping in a well-lit environment more... encouraged

   [Bad Optimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) increases performance

   [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm) is required for Pretty Beaches and KleeSlabs

   [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements) improves the advancements screen

   [Biomancy](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomancy) is a flesh-themed magic mod

   [Blueprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint) is required for Autumnity

   [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania) is a flower-themed tech/magic mod

   [Ceiling Torch](https://modrinth.com/mod/ceiling-torch) allows you to place torches on the ceiling

   [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky) changes the way chunks are loaded to increase performance and decrease CPU usage

   [Cobweb](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobweb) is required for Harvest with Ease

   [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective) is required for Crying Portals and Tree Harvester

   [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling) makes the keybinds screen easier to use

   [Corpse](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse) generates a corpse that stores your items on death

   [CraftTweaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafttweaker) allows the creation of custom recipes

   [Craftable Notch Apple](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craftable-notch-apple) makes the enchanted golden apple craftable again

   [Crafting on a Stick](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting-on-a-stick) allows you to use crafting stations without placing them down by putting them on a stick

   [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) adds a large variety of machines you can use to build your own mechanisms

   [Create: Quark Runes](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-quark-runes) allows you to make Quark runes using Create mechanisms

   [Create: Structures](https://modrinth.com/datapack/create-structures) adds Create-themed structures to villages

   [CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore) is required for Ambient Sounds and Enhanced Visuals

   [Crying Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/crying-portals) allows crying obsidian to be used for nether portal frames

   [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) adds a Curios accessory screen for charms etc.

   [Dark Side](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-side) adds spooky magic-user mobs

   [Day Counter](https://modrinth.com/mod/ag-day-counter) adds a title that appears each time a new day begins

   [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) expands into the Deep Dark by adding a new dimension and some new sculk-themed content

   [Demogorgon Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/demogorgon) adds Demogorgons from Stranger Things

   [Difusement](https://modrinth.com/mod/difusement) adds a new enchanting table with new enchanting mechanics

   [Distant Friends](https://modrinth.com/mod/distant-friends) gives you friends that disappear when you get too close

   [Dramatic Skies (Resource Pack)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dramatic-skys) makes the sky look better

   [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) increases your FPS

   [Eidolon Rebrewed](https://modrinth.com/mod/eidolon-rebrewed) is a theurgy/alchemy mod that I found fit the vibe

   [Enhanced Visuals](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedvisuals) adds some new visuals to getting hurt, experiencing explosionns, beign underwater, etc.

   [Fastload](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastload) increases the loading speed of the game

   [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) improves performance

   [Fog Looks Good Now](https://modrinth.com/mod/fog-looks-good-now) makes fog look better

   [Forgotten Aberration](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgotten-aberration) adds aberration-type D&D creatures

   [Forgotten Beasts](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgotten-beasts) adds beast-type D&D creatures

   [Forgotten Dragons](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgotten-dragons) adds dragon-type D&D creatures

   [Forgotten Fey](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgotten-fey) adds fey-type D&D creatures

   [Forgotten Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgotten-mobs) adds other D&D creatures

   [Friends & Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes-forge) adds mob-vote-losers

   [From The Fog](https://modrinth.com/datapack/from-the-fog) adds Herobrine

   [Game Menu Mod Option](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamemenumodoption) adds a button to view mods in-game

   [Gardens of the Dead](https://modrinth.com/mod/gardens-of-the-dead) adds two new spooky nether biomes

   [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) is required for Graveyard, Occultism, Sanity: Descent into Madness, Midnight Madness, Deino's Mobs, Biomancy, Cave Dweller Reimagined, and Haunted Fields

   [Gothic RPG](https://modrinth.com/mod/gothic-rpg) adds creatures from the Gothic series

   [Harvest with Ease](https://modrinth.com/mod/harvest-with-ease) allows right-click-harvesting crops

   [Hysteria Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/hysteria-shaders) makes the game darker and creepier

   [Insanity Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/insanity-shader) is the predecessor of Hysteria

   [In Your World](https://modrinth.com/mod/in-your-world) adds strange structures and a silent ovserver

   [Item Filters](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-filters) is required for FTB Quests, you can remove this if you're not playing with FTB Quests

   [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) lets you see what you're looking at

   [Just Another Rotten Flesh To Leather Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/jrftl) allows you to smelt rotten flesh into leather

   [Just Enough Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/jea) displays advancements in Just Enough Items

   [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) adds a menu of all items in-game and allows you to view recipes and uses of all items

   [Just Hammers](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-hammers) adds hammers to mine more blocks at once

   [Just Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-zoom) allows you to zoom by pressing a key

   [KleeSlabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/kleeslabs) allows you to break half-double-slabs

   [Konkrete](https://modrinth.com/mod/konkrete) is required for Just Zoom

   [LibX](https://modrinth.com/mod/libx) is required for Just Enough Advancements

   [Lightspeed](https://modrinth.com/mod/lightspeed) increases the loading speed

   [Loot Bundles](https://modrinth.com/mod/loot-bundles) adds loot bundles that give you random items

   [Low on Fire (Resource Pack)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-on-fire) shrinks the burning texture to make it less annoying

   [Lucent](https://modrinth.com/mod/lucent) changes the way light is rendered

   [Midnight Madness](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnight-madness) adds demon creatures

   [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) increases performance and fixes bugs present in modern Minecraft

   [Modonomicon](https://modrinth.com/mod/modonomicon) is required for Occultism

   [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) adds dragging and scoll mechanics to your mouse

   [Nimble](https://modrinth.com/mod/nimble) improves the 3rd person camera

   [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) brings 1st person animations to 3rd person

   [Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes) prevents the game from closing on crash, and instead redirects you to the main menu

   [Nyctophobia](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyctophobia) adds new, spooky biomes

   [Nyctophobia Dread](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nyctophobia-dread) makes the darkness more dangerous

   [Nyf's Spiders](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyfs-spiders) makes spiders crawl more realistically

   [Occultism](https://modrinth.com/mod/occultism) allows you to summon spirits by drawing pentagrams with chalk

   [Oculus](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus) allows you to play with shaders without using OptiFine

   [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) adds guidebooks

   [Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph) removes recipe conflicts by adding a "change recipe output" button

   [Pretty Beaches](https://modrinth.com/mod/pretty-beaches) makes farming sand near rivers/oceans less ugly

   [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) adds a ton of tiny tweaks and items

   [Quark Oddities](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark-oddities) adds a few more tweaks and items to Quark

   [Rubidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubidium) is an unofficial fork of Sodium, do not switch out for Embeddium!

   [Sanity: Descent into Madness](https://modrinth.com/mod/sanity-descent-into-madness) adds a sanity system with hallucinations

   [SecurityCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/security-craft) allows you to make your base more secure with a variety of items and blocks

   [Simple Storage Network](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-storage-network) allows the creation of very simple storage networks using easy-to-use cables and chests

   [SmartBrainLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/smartbrainlib) is required for Occultism

   [Solesteam's Sinister Sea Stalker](https://modrinth.com/mod/solesteams-sinister-sea-stalker) adds a sea stalker

   [Sons of Sins](https://modrinth.com/mod/sons-of-sins) adds creatures based on the seven deadly sins

   [Souns Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) overhauls the way sounds are handled

   [Spartan Shields](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-shields) adds shields made from different materials

   [Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry) adds a lot of different weapons

   [Spelunker's Charm II](https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkers-charm-ii) adds a few new features and events to caves

   [Spooklementary Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/spooklementary) makes the game very dark and very spooky

   [Tenebrous Lands](https://modrinth.com/mod/tenebrous-lands) adds a few spooky creatures

   [Tense Ambience](https://modrinth.com/mod/tense-ambience) adds creepy music and sounds

   [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith) adds lots of new biomes and overhauls generation of vanilla biomes

   [The Box of Horrors](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-box-of-horrors) adds popular creepypasta creatures

   [The Deep Void](https://modrinth.com/mod/(mortius)-the-deep-void) adds a new void dimension

   [The Doppelganger](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-doppelganger) adds a doppelganger that can assume the shape of any vanilla monster

   [The Graveyard](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-graveyard-fabric) adds spooky biomes, structures, and creatures

   [The John Mod Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/john_mod_reborn) adds Johns

   [The Knocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-knocker) adds a creature that will sometimes knock on your door and stalk you through your windows

   [The Man from the Fog](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-man-from-the-fog) adds a creature that will stalk you from afar until chasing you down

   [The One Who Watches](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-one-who-watches) watches you from unexpected locations

   [The Slumbering Omen](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-slumbering-omen) is a huge mod about cultists and a lost soul

   [The Umbralkers](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-umbralkers) are a collection of shadow creatures

   [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) is a very useful, upgradable backpack

   [Tree Harvester](https://modrinth.com/mod/tree-harvester) allows you to harvest trees instantly by breaking the lowest block with an axe

   [True Darkness Elementary](https://modrinth.com/mod/true-darkness-elementary) adds an eerie, dark dimension

   [True Herobrine](https://modrinth.com/mod/true-herobrine) adds Herobrine

   [Twisted Horrors](https://modrinth.com/mod/twisted-horrors) adds a variety of scary-looking creatures

   [Whispering Spirits](https://modrinth.com/mod/whispering-spirits) adds ambience spirits

   [Whispers of the Wendigo](https://modrinth.com/mod/whispers-of-the-wendigo) adds the Wendigo, as well as some related structures and mechanics

   [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) adds a very useful minimap

   [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) adds a very useful world map with waypoints

   [Player Animator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator) is required for Cursed Dagger, remove if you're not playing with that

</details>

Additional Forge mods I play with that aren't included here because they're on CurseForge:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  [The Anomaly](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-anomaly) adds an anomalous Steve who will jumpscare and chase you

  [Aquaculture 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture) enhances the fishing experience with new fish, new fishing rods, and new equipment

  [ArPhEx](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/arphex) adds lots of arthropod creatures as well as three bosses (this mod IS available on Modrinth but consistently crashed my game when downloading from Modrinth)

  [Beware the Rain](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/beware-the-rain) makes the rain more dangerous by adding four new threats that appear during rain

  [Blanket Ghost](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blanket-ghost) adds SCP-6069, The Blanket Ghost, a powerful creature that can only be countered with a crucifix

  [The Builder Bear](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/builder-bear) adds SCP-1048, The Builder Bear, and some of its creations

  [The Burning Man](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/burning-man) adds SCP-457, The Burning Man, who burns

  [Cave Dweller Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller-reimagined) is a more advanced, more configurable version of the Cave Dweller

  [Cave Dweller Sound Overhaul (Resource Pack)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cave-dweller-sound-overhaul) makes the sounds made by the Cave Dweller more scary, is compatible with Cave Dweller Reimagined

  [Creeping Woods](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/creeping-woods) makes forest biomes scarier at nighttime, by adding hallucinations, lights, and even Slenderman

  [The Cuckoo Clock](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-cuckoo-clock) adds SCP-4975, The Cuckoo Clock, which will stalk you in the dark, making creepy noises

  [Deep Blood](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deep-blood) adds a lot of blood-related content

  [Eric's Toy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/erics-toy) adds SCP-066, Eric's Toy, a ball of yarn that will sometimes scream at you

  [Erie](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/erie) adds Erie, a tall creature that can rarely be found around the world

  [Eye Pods](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eye-pods) adds SCP-131, Eye Pods, who are peaceful companions to hang out with

  [Eyes in the Dark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eyes-in-the-dark) adds SCP-280, Eyes in the Dark, which are floating entities with glowing eyes that watch you from the darkness

  [Eyes in the Darkness](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eyes-in-the-darkness) adds floating pairs of eyes that giggle at you and can jumpscare you

  [Fake Player](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-fake-player) gives you a friend who will place blocks around your world and make their presence known to you in a relatively subtle way

  [The Slasher](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-slasher-by-flamc04) adds Ghostface, who will breathe at you from afar

  [The Grinner](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-grinner) spawns in dark oak and cave biomes to stalk you

  [The Hard to Destroy Reptile](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-hard-to-destroy-reptile) adds SCP-682, The Hard to Destroy Reptile, which is a giant lizard and practically immortal

  [Hollow Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hollow-mod) adds dweller-related creatures but also a new biome and new equipment

  [Humans Refuted](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/humans-refuted) adds SCP-3199, Humans Refuted, which can appear around your world and will spawn an egg on death

  [Lights Out](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lights-out-1) adds lots of popular horror creatures

  [Minechosis](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minechosis) adds a few creepy monsters to different biomes, that will all terrorize you in their own unique way

  [Peeping Tom](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/peeping-tom) adds Peeping Tom, staring at you from very far away...

  [Peripheral Jumper](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/peripheral-jumper) adds SCP-372, The Peripheral Jumper, which hides behind your head to occasionally jumpscare you a little

  [Plague Doctor](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-plague-doctor) adds SCP-049, The Plague Doctor, who will attempt to "cure" you from the Pestilence

  [Possessive Mask](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-possessive-mask) adds SCP-035, The Possessive Mask, which you should never put on

  [Rake: The Arrival](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rake-the-arrival) adds the Rake, who will flee until you get too close

  [Red Sea Object](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/red-sea-object) adds SCP-093, Red Sea Object, which is a disk that you should only touch at your own risk

  [The Sculpture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-sculpture) adds SCP-173, The Sculpture, which moves at the speed of light when not looked at, attempting to snap your neck

  [Shut Your Eyes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shut-your-eyes) adds a creature you must not look at

  [The Shy Guy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-shy-guy) adds SCP-096, The Shy Guy, who you also must not look at

  [Skin And Bones](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/skin-and-bones) adds a feww creatures related to American folklore

  [Sleep Killer](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sleep-killer) adds SCP-966, The Sleep Killer, which prevent you from sleeping and cause you to take damage over time

  [Starving Skeletons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/starving-skeletons) adds SCP-2863, Starving Skeletons, which spawn at night and can trample you if you're not careful

  [The Man from the Shadow](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-man-from-the-shadow) adds a dark figure whistling at you

  [The Flute Man](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-flute-man) will chase you down unless you're hidden very well once you hear his flute

  [The Old AI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-old-ai) adds SCP-079, The Old AI, a computer that can interact with redstone

  [The Old Man](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-old-man) adds SCP-106, The Old Man, who breaches containment eventually and occasionally spawns to kidnap you into his pocket dimension

  [The Scarecrow](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-scarecrow) adds a scary sentient scarecrow

  [The Stairwell](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-stairwell) adds SCP-087, The Stairwell, which goes infinitely deep underground, and is home to deadly creatures

  [The Intruder](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-intruder) is a mysterious figure that will sometimes spawn to chase you

  [Tickle Monster](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tickle-monster) adds SCP-999, Tickle Monster, which is just a squishy friend

  [The Curse of the Woodsman](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-curse-of-the-woodsman) adds a forest killer and his victim, the woodsman, as well as some amateur filmers

  [With Many Voices](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/with-many-voices) adds SCP-939, With Many Voices, which are pack predators sometimes spawning in caves

  [Plague Steve](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-plague-horror-mod) adds Plague Steve, who I have never encountered so far unfortunately

  [Biome Music](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biome-music) adds new music to different biomes, and is required for Eerie Music

  [Boogeyman](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/boogeyman) adds SCP-015, The Boogeyman, which will kill you if you're in the dark for too long

  [Born in Chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos) adds some structures and creatures with different mechanics

  [Can't Sleep](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cant-sleep-creepypasta) adds a creature that will keep you awake at night

  [Cupboard](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard) is required for Eerie Music and Biome Music

  [Cursed Dagger](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-cursed-dagger) adds a powerful dagger that comes with an extreme danger

  [Deino's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deinos-mobs) adds a few creatures to different biomes with different abilities and mechanics

  [Eerie Hauntings](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eerie-hauntings) adds a spirit that can haunt you, and that you have to get rid of by gathering evidence and cleansing it correspondingly

  [Eerie Music](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eerie-music-forge-fabric) adds creepy music to Biome Music

  [FTB Library](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-forge) is required for FTB Quests/Teams

  [FTB Quests](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-forge) allows you to view the small number of quests I've made for this modpack (not required at all, and I will likely not keep working on the quests)

  [FTB Teams](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-forge) is required for FTB Quests

  [Haunted Fields](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/haunted-fields) adds a summonable scarecrow that looks kinda creepy

  [Hud Texts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hud-texts) is required for Day Counter

  [Lodestone](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lodestone) is required for Malum

  [Malum](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/malum) introduces spirit-based magic

  [The Crying Villager](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-crying-villager-impostor-villager) adds a crying villager that attacks other villagers and players

  [Sccreamer](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/screamer) adds the Screamer from Content Warning

  [Herobrine's Secret Brother](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simon12-herobrines-secret-brother) adds Simon_12, who will sometimes spawn to attack you

  [The Beasts in the Dark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-beasts-in-the-dark) adds two creatures that will hunt you if you're in darkness for too long

  [The Figures](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/boryss-figures) adds a few entities that do different things to spook you

  [The Phantom From The Night](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-phantom-from-the-night) adds glowing creatures in caves

  [The "Player"](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-player) adds a fake player that will watch you from afar

  [The Peeper](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-peeper) can spawn at night to watch and then murder you

  [Whisperwoods](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/whisperwoods) adds a few creepy forest creatures

</details>

Check out my YouTube channel for videos: [Rogue049](https://www.youtube.com/@rogue049)

Also, [join my Discord server](https://discord.gg/AAJPyYw5K9)! Alternatively, add me on Discord directly (Rogue049)
